  "findings": [
    "Conductors are undersized for the specified load and run length, resulting in excessive voltage drop.",
    "Non-compliance with engineered drawings and NEC voltage drop recommendations."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the installation of the undersized conductors immediately.",
    "Verify the engineered drawings and recalculate the required wire gauge for the specific run length and load.",
    "Replace the undersized conductors with the correctly sized wire gauge per NEC Table 310.16 and voltage drop calculations."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing conductors that are undersized for the load and length violates NEC recommendations for voltage drop and can lead to equipment malfunction, overheating, and premature failure. Since the work is actively in progress, it must be halted and corrected before proceeding further.",

    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4",

  ]
